title: Powerplay Salary Income
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Amount), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS payments FROM PowerplaySalary WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} Cr accumulated over {payments} weekly salary payment(s) during the report period. Powerplay salary is passive income that most commanders overlook — it scales with your rank within your chosen Power and rewards sustained political engagement even when you're not actively running merits.
details.help: PowerplaySalary fires each week a rank-based payment is made. total drives the title as the cumulative passive income figure.

tagLines: Powerplay salary payments reconciled. The Pilots Federation confirms weekly stipend disbursements per rank.
It arrived in your account every week whether you flew or not. That's the benefit of rank.
The Power pays a salary. You earned enough rank to get a decent one. That investment compounds.
